tasks.subject: [smart-agent-groups] [P1] Schema discriminator + rules + evaluation core
tasks.description: Add kind discriminator + SmartGroupRulesSchema to SidebarGroupSchema with the cross-field refine (smart requires ≥1 rule; manual ignores rules), conf migration per adding-config-fields. Pure evaluate-smart-group.ts (AND across fields, OR within; injected now) and describeRules() summary helper. Full predicate/combination test matrix + summary snapshots + schema refine tests (spec §1-2).
tasks.activeForm: Building the smart-group schema and evaluation core

tasks.subject: [smart-agent-groups] [P2] Render smart sections: derived members, multi-presence, honesty UI
tasks.description: Smart sections resolve members via evaluateSmartGroup (memoized on rules/candidates identity); multi-presence preserved; rule glyph + summary in header menu; '0 matching' ghost row; drop rejection with inline hint; member rows not draggable-out; DOR-339 collapse/mute/displayFilter apply unchanged (spec §3). RTL tests incl. live re-evaluation on attention flip.

tasks.subject: [smart-agent-groups] [P3] Create/edit fork, presets, disclosure, convert-to-manual
tasks.description: Group-create dialog manual/smart fork with the rule form (runtime checkboxes, namespace multi-select when >1, status multi-select, activity-window select, path prefix); preset chips (Active now, By-runtime per runtime with ≥2 agents); 'Edit rules' from header menu; convert-to-manual materialization; disclosure threshold (≥8 agents or ≥2 runtimes) hides the fork for small fleets (spec §4-5). Component tests for each.

tasks.subject: [smart-agent-groups] [P4] ADR, docs, changelog fragment, implementation report
tasks.description: Extract the ADR (rule-derived client-side membership, never materialized — mesh stays source of truth); docs-site smart-groups section; changelog fragment; 04-implementation.md; manifest → implemented. DOR-329 + DOR-339 suites green; pnpm verify clean.
